name: Virtual World Gate - Qinglong
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>脳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>堺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>青</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>チン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ロン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can banish 1 "Virtual World" card from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; negate its effects until the end of this turn (even if this card leaves the field). You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Virtual World" monster from your Deck to your hand, then send 1 card from your hand to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Virtual World Gate - Qinglong" once per turn.
eff: You can banish 1 "Virtual World" card from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; negate its effects until the end of this turn (even if this card leaves the field). You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Virtual World" monster from your Deck to your hand, then send 1 card from your hand to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Virtual World Gate - Qinglong" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
